fixes.diff:
diff --git a/cli/logs.py b/cli/logs.py
index cbe7cc3..340a398 100644
--- a/cli/logs.py
+++ b/cli/logs.py
@@ -30,9 +30,6 @@ _DEFAULT_LINES = 100
 _DEFAULT_WORKER_PROCESS_NAME = "datasystem_worker"
 _FALLBACK_LOG_DIR = "~/.datasystem/logs"
 _INFO_LOG_SUFFIX = ".INFO.log"
-_WORKER_ADDRESS_RE = re.compile(r"^[A-Za-z0-9.-]+:[0-9]+$")
-_MIN_PORT = 1
-_MAX_PORT = 65535
 
 
 def _parse_positive_int(value):
@@ -48,11 +45,9 @@ def _parse_positive_int(value):
 
 def _validate_worker_address(address):
     """Validate and return a worker address in host:port form."""
-    if not isinstance(address, str) or not _WORKER_ADDRESS_RE.fullmatch(address):
+    if not isinstance(address, str) or not address:
         raise ValueError("worker_address must be in host:port form")
-    port = int(address.rsplit(":", 1)[1])
-    if port < _MIN_PORT or port > _MAX_PORT:
-        raise ValueError("worker_address port must be between 1 and 65535")
+    util.is_valid_address_port(address)
     return address
 
 
diff --git a/cli/tests/test_logs.py b/cli/tests/test_logs.py
index 159e74f..b5838d7 100644
--- a/cli/tests/test_logs.py
+++ b/cli/tests/test_logs.py
@@ -81,6 +81,25 @@ class TestLogsCommand(unittest.TestCase):
             capture_output=True, text=True,
         )
 
+    @mock.patch.object(logs.Command, "load_worker_config_defaults")
+    @mock.patch.object(logs.Command, "get_process_args", return_value=[])
+    @mock.patch("yr.datasystem.cli.logs.subprocess.run")
+    @mock.patch.object(logs.Command, "find_worker_pid", return_value=4321)
+    def test_run_accepts_bracketed_ipv6_worker_address(
+        self, mock_pid, mock_run, _mock_args, mock_defaults
+    ):
+        """Bracketed IPv6 worker addresses are accepted like other CLI commands."""
+        mock_defaults.return_value = {"log_dir": "./datasystem/logs", "log_filename": ""}
+        mock_run.return_value = mock.Mock(returncode=0, stdout="a\nb\nc\n", stderr="")
+
+        cmd = logs.Command()
+        args = mock.Mock(worker_address="[::1]:31501", lines=100)
+        rc = cmd.run(args)
+
+        self.assertEqual(rc, logs.BaseCommand.SUCCESS)
+        mock_pid.assert_called_once_with("[::1]:31501")
+        mock_run.assert_called_once()
+
     @mock.patch("yr.datasystem.cli.logs.subprocess.run")
     def test_run_rejects_invalid_worker_address(self, mock_run):
         """A malformed worker address is rejected before running tail."""
